snapshot.scope: Independent Product Planning review binds the exact Activity stable page-target implementation at 2848995a to the Activity API, UI and acceptance owners without changing implementation, renderer or test bytes.

reviewers.task: Activity stable page-target implementation and owner-contract review
reviewers.independence: Product Planning did not author the Activity implementation or renderer delta and independently compared its stable target, active-vault fences, Reader routing and Undo separation with the exact tests and UI Design handoff.

dimensions.summary: The Activity API owns one optional stable page target and active-vault list identity; the existing Reader adapter owns navigation without a duplicate route or path authority.
Main and preload project only an optional page ID target, while renderer fences the list's active Vault and never derives authority from targetLabel or a path.
Exact service, shell and renderer tests add target/open evidence while Requirement and Exit remain partial and packaged visual/platform proof remains explicitly open.
Focused regressions cover stable-target presence and omission, exact page ID routing, vault drift, close-after-render behavior and independent Undo recovery.
The bounded change fits the existing Activity API and UI owners plus existing trace IDs; no new owner document, PRD promise, durable decision or status promotion is needed.

verification.command: Independent implementation and owner-contract review of Activity page-target candidate 2848995a
verification.evidence: Review covers the exact ten implementation/UI/test paths, safe optional target DTO, active-vault ownership, Reader routing and independent checksum-bound Undo.

verification.command: npm run verify:docs && npm run verify:decisions && npm run verify:traceability
verification.evidence: Links, whitespace, document map, PRD structure, trace evidence and decision records pass without a Requirement, Exit or Phase status change.

verification.command: npm run verify:contracts && npm run verify:independent-documentation-review && npm run verify:documentation-leanness
verification.evidence: CON-001 through CON-004 remain green and the recipe binds governed roots plus the exact Activity contract/UI tests without broadening renderer authority.

coordination.compatibility: The candidate adds only an optional stable page target and list-level active-vault identity; target absence preserves prior Activity display and Undo behavior, with no migration or path authority.
coordination.acknowledgement: Product Planning reviewed the exact Activity implementation and UI evidence, synchronized the bounded owners, and retained partial statuses plus the real macOS visual hold.

nonBlockingRisks: Real macOS Activity Open raster evidence remains on hold because desktop control was unavailable; focused interaction tests are exact but do not substitute for packaged visual proof.
Broader Activity history/routing, restore/redo, mutation and platform coverage remain open; no Requirement, Exit or Phase status is promoted.
